description_long: This object is a military-style motorized unicycle, featuring a robust olive-green metal frame with a large white star insignia on the front shield and side panel, reminiscent of classic army vehicles. The unicycle is equipped with a single large wheel, a prominent headlamp, and a brown leather saddle seat, supported by visible suspension springs. The engine is exposed, showing metallic cylinders and pipes, and the handlebars are wide with black grips, providing control and stability. The side panels display additional military insignia, and the rear includes a license plate and a small luggage rack. The overall design is rugged, functional, and evokes a vintage military aesthetic suitable for urban or historical settings.
description: A vintage military-style motorized unicycle with an olive-green frame, white star insignia, brown leather saddle, and exposed engine components.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large olive-green shield with a white star, central headlamp, and wide handlebars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the exposed engine, brown saddle, suspension springs, and military insignia on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown saddle, luggage rack, and license plate, with handlebars visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine, suspension, and military insignia, with clear detail of the frame and wheel.
attribute_frame_design: reinforced curved military-style frame with side panels
